channel.title: Cryptographic Triangles — Release Notes
channel.description: Official release notes for the Cryptographic Triangles Qt Wallet. Subscribe to get notified when new versions ship.
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2014–2026 Cryptographic Triangles. Released under the MIT License.

item.title: v5.9.19 — Snapshot path overhaul (signature auth + auto-rebuild)
item.author: noreply@github.com (github-actions[bot])
item.description:
Snapshot path overhaul

Combines all the separate branches onto master: v5.9.18 (triangles-cli + Tor fixes) + v5.9.17-local-snapshot-trust (snapshot infrastructure) + feature/utxo-snapshot-auto-rebuild (signature auth, auto-rebuild, crash fixes).

Highlights

  • Signed UTXO snapshot authentication — DownloadUtxoSnapshot verifies the per-snapshot manifest signature against trusted signer TG8f76yktTxDrT7JJymY3wVAusXiD3fVvX using Triangles compact-message protocol.
  • Auto-rebuild trigger (-autorerebuild=N) — compares local nBestHeight to median peer height; if lag >= N, wipes chain DB (preserves wallet.dat + onion + smsg) and shuts down for clean restart.
  • FastImport as opt-in (-allowfastimport, default OFF) — snapshot is the only supported sync start.
  • Server-side fix — utxo-snapshot.bin symlinked to canonical utxo-snapshot-2207680.utx on bootstrap.cryptographic-triangles.org.

Three crash fixes

1. fSerializeChainTrust=true before LoadSnapshot writes 2. Block verification skip for snapshot-sourced chains 3. ResetSyncCheckpoint deferral for snapshot-sourced chains

Verified end-to-end from zero

Fresh datadir + signed utxo-snapshot.bin:
  • blocks: 2207680, headers: 2207680
  • bestblockhash: 6a5932e2625228d67f081ac8bf4fe3905aa25b8663f2d6b6ffc6adb47a9551ed
  • IBD: false, 4 peers connected via Tor

Pending (NOT in this release)

  • v2 snapshot format (raw blocks) — Option B, separate phase
  • DNS2 wallet daemon restart — needs Sami permission
  • Tri-seed-5/6: already on v5.9.18, can upgrade to v5.9.19 anytime

Full Changelog: v5.9.18...v5.9.19

What's Changed

  • Add triangles-cli: JSON-RPC client (port bitcoin-cli pattern) by @SamiAhmed7777 in https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5/pull/7

Full Changelog: https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5/compare/v5.9.18...v5.9.19

Download: Cryptographic-Triangles-5.9.19-win-x64-setup.exe

SHA-256: Available in the release notes on GitHub.

item.title: v5.9.9 - Remove Block 570 Checkpoint
item.author: noreply@github.com (SamiAhmed7777)
item.description:
Removes block 570 hardened checkpoint that was locking DNS2/DNS3 onto Fork A. Nodes can now sync naturally to the 2.2M+ main chain.

Full Changelog: https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5/compare/v5.9.6...v5.9.9

Download: Cryptographic-Triangles-5.9.9-win-x64-setup.exe

SHA-256: Available in the release notes on GitHub.

item.title: v5.9.8 — IBD stall fix
item.author: noreply@github.com (SamiAhmed7777)
item.description:
IBD stall fix: restore IsInitialBlockDownload() time check, add block 570 checkpoint, fix version handler IBD bypass

Full Changelog: https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5/compare/v5.9.6...v5.9.8

Download: Cryptographic-Triangles-5.9.8-win-x64-setup.exe

SHA-256: Available in the release notes on GitHub.

item.title: v5.9.7 — Infrastructure Hardening + RocksDB Backend
item.author: noreply@github.com (SamiAhmed7777)
item.description:
Changes

RocksDB Backend (Optional)

  • Complete CActiveTxDB wrapper dispatches to CTxDB (LevelDB) or CRocksTxDB
  • Runtime flag -rocksdb switches backend without recompile
  • Dual-backend UTXO snapshot loader
  • BUILD_ROCKSDB=ON compiles clean against RocksDB 8.9.1

Network Infrastructure

  • Updated hardcoded onion seeds with 6 verified working nodes
  • Updated seeds.cryptographic-triangles.org/seeds.txt with all working seeds
  • UTXO snapshot hash compiled in for height 2,203,594
  • Bootstrap server live at bootstrap.cryptographic-triangles.org

IBD Improvements

  • Stall-recovery patch uses headers-first path via hashBestHeaderSync
  • Prevents IBD freeze at block ~570 on fresh installs

Build CI

  • All 6 platforms building: Linux daemon, Linux Qt, Windows daemon, Windows Qt, macOS ARM64, unit tests
  • Release artifacts auto-published on tag push

Downloads

See assets below for pre-built binaries.

Upgrade Notes

  • Drop-in replacement for v5.9.5/v5.9.6
  • No database migration required
  • RocksDB backend is opt-in (-rocksdb flag, requires BUILD_ROCKSDB=ON compile)

Full Changelog: https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5/compare/v5.9.6...v5.9.7

Download: Cryptographic-Triangles-5.9.7-win-x64-setup.exe

SHA-256: Available in the release notes on GitHub.

item.title: v5.9.6 - Snapshot Recovery + IBD Fix + RocksDB Backend
item.author: noreply@github.com (SamiAhmed7777)
item.description:
Changes

  • UTXO Snapshot Hash Wired: Added canonical snapshot hash for height 2,203,594 in checkpoints.cpp. Enables P2P snapshot fetch for new nodes.
  • IBD Stall Recovery Patch: Headers-first path during IBD instead of legacy getblocks locator loops.
  • CActiveTxDB Wrapper: Dual-backend support (LevelDB/RocksDB) via compile-time selection.
  • Bootstrap Path Backend-Awareness: init.cpp and bootstrap.cpp use GetActiveChainDbDirName().
  • Checkpoint at 2,203,594: Verified block hash added to mapCheckpoints.

Binaries

Built for Windows (Qt+daemon), Linux (Qt+daemon), macOS (Apple Silicon). ARM64 build via tri-pi repository.

Full Changelog: https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5/compare/v5.95...v5.9.6

Full Changelog: https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5/compare/v5.95...v5.9.6

Download: Cryptographic-Triangles-5.9.6-win-x64-setup.exe

SHA-256: Available in the release notes on GitHub.

item.title: Triangles v5.8.2 - Critical Stability Release
item.author: noreply@github.com (SamiAhmed7777)
item.description:
Triangles v5.8.2 - Critical Stability Release

🔥 Major Stability Improvements

This release fixes critical stability issues that improve production readiness and prevent crashes, data corruption, and DoS attacks.

🔒 Critical Fixes (P0)

1. Null Pointer Crash Prevention

  • Fixed: Seed node crashes in difficulty calculation
  • Fixed: RPC endpoint crashes (getinfo, getmininginfo, getdifficulty)
  • Impact: Eliminates crash-loops, ensures 24/7 seed node uptime
  • Files: src/main.cpp, src/rpcblockchain.cpp

2. Chain Reorganization Atomicity

  • Fixed: Database corruption during failed chain reorganizations
  • Fixed: DB/memory state desynchronization
  • Impact: Prevents blockchain state corruption on reorg failures
  • Details: All in-memory operations now occur AFTER database commit
  • Files: src/main.cpp

🛡️ Security & DoS Prevention (P1)

3. Orphan Block Memory Management

  • Fixed: Memory exhaustion attack via orphan blocks
  • Added: Proactive cleanup on IBD→sync transition
  • Added: Better diagnostic logging
  • Impact: DoS resistant, prevents memory leaks
  • Files: src/main.cpp, src/main.h

📊 Operational Improvements (P2)

4. Enhanced Database Error Logging

  • Added: Critical error messages for DB failures
  • Added: Actionable guidance (disk full, corruption, permissions)
  • Impact: Faster incident diagnosis and resolution
  • Files: src/txdb-leveldb.cpp

5. Build Fix

  • Fixed: Compilation error with fWalletUnlockStakingOnly global variable
  • Files: src/rpcmining.cpp

---

✅ Consensus Safety

All changes are consensus-safe:

  • ✅ No fork risk

  • ✅ No validation rule changes

  • ✅ Existing chain data remains valid

  • ✅ Safe to deploy immediately

---

📈 Code Quality

  • +80 lines of critical fixes
  • -34 lines of duplicate code removed
  • 4 files improved
  • Cleaner, more maintainable codebase

---

🚀 Deployment

Upgrading from v5.8.1 or earlier:

1. Stop your node 2. Backup your wallet.dat 3. Replace the binary 4. Restart

No special migration needed - just drop in the new binary!

---

📦 What's Included

  • trianglesd - Daemon for headless operation
  • triangles-qt - GUI wallet
  • triangles-cli - Command-line interface
  • All platforms: Linux (x64, ARM64), macOS (Intel, ARM64), Windows (x64)

---

🔗 Links

  • Source: https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5
  • Explorer: https://blocks.cryptographic-triangles.org
  • Website: https://cryptographic-triangles.org

---

Full Changelog: https://github.com/SamiAhmed7777/triangles_v5/compare/v5.8.1...v5.8.2

Built with ❤️ by the Triangles community

Download: Cryptographic-Triangles-5.8.2-win-x64-setup.exe

SHA-256: Available in the release notes on GitHub.
